final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic concept art / editorial illustration, wide landscape
Primary request: cyberpunk futuristic cityscape at night with flying cars, acid rain, and neon-lit reflections on wet ground
Scene/backdrop: dense futuristic megacity at night, towering skyscrapers packed tightly, acid rain falling from a heavy overcast sky, puddles and flooded streets reflecting neon signs
Subject: sprawling cyberpunk city — massive high-rise buildings covered in holographic billboards and neon signage, multiple flying cars streaking through the air between buildings, rain-soaked ground with vivid light reflections
Style/medium: digital concept art, photorealistic rendering, cyberpunk aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, slight low-angle looking up into the city canyon, deep perspective drawing the eye into the glowing skyline
Lighting/mood: harsh neon glow from countless signs and advertisements, flickering blue and violet light, moody and decadent atmosphere, rain streaks catching light mid-air
Color palette: dominant blue and purple tones, electric violet neon accents, deep indigo shadows, occasional magenta and cyan highlights
Materials/textures: wet reflective asphalt with mirror-like puddles, glass and steel skyscraper facades, glowing neon tubes, rain-streaked windows
Constraints: maintain blue-purple dominant color grading throughout; flying cars must be clearly visible mid-air between buildings; acid rain and puddle reflections must be prominent
Avoid: warm golden tones, daytime lighting, clean dry streets, retro-futurism without grit
